title: More Mob Tower Variants
description: This Mod Adds: 12 New Mob Towers To Your World! No More Pillager Towers Only
body:
![mob](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b3883802e3795aab7b5838fe7795d91f911b15d.png)
This mod adds a total of: 12 new pillager towers to your world, only there are NO pillagers in them but other mobs:

Stray Tower,
Skeleton Tower,
Warden Tower,
Iron Golem Tower,
Vindicator Tower,
Piglin / Brute Tower,
FrogTower,
Evoker Tower,
Magma Cube Tower,
Zombie Tower,
Creeper Tower.

![above](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d8293f0766f650612c2a642591755c564edcd60.png)
**Bogged Tower.**

**Breeze Tower**

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

One tip to you! enter these towers during the day and not at night, these towers are much harder at night!

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8d1c0609612aa574d48d11fcaab732efef525d3.png)
![skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/618249734520a78d22da3e206c2e130aab9430ed.png)


![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
